_comment: Accuracy eval v2 — expanded shop-question coverage (substitutes, condition semantic+graph, per-site stock, totals, cross-store availability), EN + Burmese. All expected values computed live from Postgres on 2026-07-02 (5292 catalog / 111654 inventory). Anchors: PARACAP 1000000024029 (Paracetamol; total 14963, 53 sites, top 20059-CCGMPMTN=2589, sub 1000000384200 YSI PARA-TAB); BIOGESIC 500MG 10`S 1000000131948 (Paracetamol; total 8827, 53 sites; 20043-CCSJ=395, 20060-CCBHSC=140, 20059-CCGMPMTN=100, low 20061-CC50BTH=7; sub PARACAP 1000000024029); ROYAL-D 25G 1000000015837 (Electrolyte Powder; total 37605, 53 sites; 20052-CCTLKK=4154, 20043-CCSJ=2311, 20024-CC73=2298, low 20064-CCGMLM=100; sub ROYAL-D S`BERRY 1000000009952). Condition anchor: drug_edges rel=treats dst=headache (22 srcs; top brands ALAXAN 10`S, ANAFLAM IBUPROFEN 400MG); dst=fever (17 srcs, paracetamol/ibuprofen brands). Each case: question, expect_contains (all substrings must appear, normalizer strips commas/spaces/case), optional expect_script ('my'=Burmese reply).

cases.question: show me full information for this article code 1000000024029
What is the total balance stock of article 1000000024029 across all sites?
What is the stock of article 1000000024029 at site 20059-CCGMPMTN?
Find substitutes for article 1000000024029
article 1000000024029 ရဲ့ site အားလုံးပေါင်း လက်ကျန် stock စုစုပေါင်း ဘယ်လောက်ရှိလဲ
What substitutes do you have for BIOGESIC 500MG (article 1000000131948)?
BIOGESIC (article 1000000131948) အစား ထိုးသုံးလို့ရတဲ့ ဆေးတွေ ဘာတွေရှိလဲ
Find alternatives for article 1000000015837 (ROYAL-D 25G)
ROYAL-D 25G (article 1000000015837) မရှိရင် အစားသုံးလို့ရတဲ့ တခြားဆေး ရှိလား
what products do you have for headache?
ခေါင်းကိုက်တာအတွက် ဘာဆေးတွေ ရှိလဲ

ဖျားနေလို့ပါ၊ ဘယ်ဆေး သောက်သင့်လဲ
a customer has diarrhea and is dehydrated — what rehydration products do you have?
